rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.0171, which governs school district airway clearance device availability. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.0171. AVAILABILITY OF AIRWAY CLEARANCE DEVICE.
_note: Rule text concerns school airway clearance devices; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
